name: Pork with Apples
recipeInstructions:
1. Coat pork with 2 tablespoons flour.
2. Heat 1 tablespoon butter in a heavy nonstick skillet over high heat.
3. Add cutlets; cook for 1 minute per side. Transfer to platter.
4. Add remaining tablespoon butter to the skillet. Reduce heat to medium-high.
5. Add shallots and apples; cook, stirring occasionally, for 5 minutes.
6. Add apple cider and broth; cook for 3 minutes or until apples are tender.
7. Whisk together remaining tablespoon flour and cream in a small bowl.
8. Stir into the skillet. Add salt and pepper; cook, stirring, for 3 minutes
or until thickened.
9. Pour over pork cutlets. Garnish with parsley.
